title: Truist cuts Regions Financial rating to hold from buy on ‘revenue headwinds'
text: Truist on Monday downgraded Regions Financial Corp. RF to hold from buy and cut the financial stock's price target to $20 from $21. Truist analyst Brandon King said the firm is better able to withstand economic challenges with more downside rate protection, but revenue growth is expected to be more difficult.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Regions Financial (RF) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Regions Financial (RF) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.62 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.65 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.55 per share a year ago.

title: Regions Financial profit up12% on ‘stable' deposits, despite banking sector turmoil
text: Regions Financial Corp. RF, -1.72% said it grew its profit by 12% as deposits remained stable despite turmoil in the banking sector during the quarter. Regions Financial said its first-quarter profit increased to $588 million, or 62 cents a share, from $524 million, or 55 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: What's in Store for Regions Financial (RF) in Q1 Earnings?
text: Regions Financial's (RF) Q1 results are likely to be affected by declining revenues from wealth management income, mortgage income and service charges. Further, higher funding costs are likely to have affected NIM.

title: What Should Investors Watch in Regional Bank Earnings?
text: We're about to see how the recent banking turmoil affected regional financial institutions.

title: JPMorgan Leads Bank Earnings This Week As Balance Sheets, Guidance Key
text: JPMorgan reports Friday, along with Wells Fargo, Citigroup and PNC Financial. Balance sheets and guidance may trump Q1 earnings.
